'''鈭歵-ch-l''' ('''katachal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hitchel|hitchel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hitchel|hitchel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-ch-l
|-
! Lemma
| katachal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitachal|thitachal]] || [[word:jitachal|jitachal]] || [[word:shitachal|shitachal]] || [[word:kitachal|kitachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutachal|thuthutachal]] || [[word:jujutachal|jujutachal]] || [[word:shushutachal|shushutachal]] || [[word:kukutachal|kukutachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutachal|thutachal]] || [[word:jutachal|jutachal]] || [[word:shutachal|shutachal]] || [[word:kutachal|kutachal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutachal|thutachal]] || [[word:jutachal|jutachal]] || [[word:shutachal|shutachal]] || [[word:kutachal|kutachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetachal|thetachal]] || [[word:jetachal|jetachal]] || [[word:shetachal|shetachal]] || [[word:ketachal|ketachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotachal|thothotachal]] || [[word:jojotachal|jojotachal]] || [[word:shoshotachal|shoshotachal]] || [[word:kokotachal|kokotachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotachal|thotachal]] || [[word:jotachal|jotachal]] || [[word:shotachal|shotachal]] || [[word:kotachal|kotachal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotachal|thotachal]] || [[word:jotachal|jotachal]] || [[word:shotachal|shotachal]] || [[word:kotachal|kotachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tachal|th忙tachal]] || [[word:j忙tachal|j忙tachal]] || [[word:sh忙tachal|sh忙tachal]] || [[word:k忙tachal|k忙tachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatachal|thathatachal]] || [[word:jajatachal|jajatachal]] || [[word:shashatachal|shashatachal]] || [[word:kakatachal|kakatachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatachal|thatachal]] || [[word:jatachal|jatachal]] || [[word:shatachal|shatachal]] || [[word:katachal|katachal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatachal|thatachal]] || [[word:jatachal|jatachal]] || [[word:shatachal|shatachal]] || [[word:katachal|katachal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatachal|shatachal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatachal|goshatachal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatachal|gokishatachal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatachaln眉|shatachaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatachalnkn眉|goshatachalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachaln眉|gokishatachaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatachalsh毛|shatachalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatachalnksh毛|goshatachalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatachalsh毛|gokishatachalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachalro|shatachalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachalnkro|goshatachalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachalro|gokishatachalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachalmu|shatachalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachalnkmu|goshatachalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachalmu|gokishatachalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatachalsher|shatachalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatachalnksher|goshatachalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatachalsher|gokishatachalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatachalng|shatachalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatachalnkng|goshatachalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatachalng|gokishatachalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatachalya|shatachalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatachalnkya|goshatachalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatachalya|gokishatachalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatachalyam|shatachalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatachalnkyam|goshatachalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatachalyam|gokishatachalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachaln眉sh毛|shatachaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachalnkn眉sh毛|goshatachalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachaln眉sh毛|gokishatachaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachaln眉ro|shatachaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachalnkn眉ro|goshatachalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachaln眉ro|gokishatachaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachaln眉mu|shatachaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachalnkn眉mu|goshatachalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachaln眉mu|gokishatachaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachalsh毛n眉|shatachalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachalnksh毛n眉|goshatachalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachalsh毛n眉|gokishatachalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachalsh毛ro|shatachalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachalnksh毛ro|goshatachalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachalsh毛ro|gokishatachalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachalsh毛mu|shatachalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachalnksh毛mu|goshatachalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachalsh毛mu|gokishatachalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachalron眉|shatachalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachalnkron眉|goshatachalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachalron眉|gokishatachalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachalrosh毛|shatachalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachalnkrosh毛|goshatachalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachalrosh毛|gokishatachalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatachalromu|shatachalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatachalnkromu|goshatachalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatachalromu|gokishatachalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatachalmun眉|shatachalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatachalnkmun眉|goshatachalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatachalmun眉|gokishatachalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatachalmush毛|shatachalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatachalnkmush毛|goshatachalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatachalmush毛|gokishatachalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatachalmuro|shatachalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatachalnkmuro|goshatachalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatachalmuro|gokishatachalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
